summary: Iteration 42 - Provider Profile Page Public/Admin View Testing. All 14 test cases PASSED. Public view: Cyan hero visible with provider name, rating, address, comuna. NO admin bar, NO edit buttons. Premium gallery visible. Contact section shows login prompt. Admin view: Admin bar with 'Modo Admin' text and 'Destacado / Suscripción / Place ID' button. Cyan hero with 'Editar' button next to name. All edit buttons visible (Gestionar Slider, Agregar Video, Agregar Servicios, Gestionar Fotos, Edit on Precio/Contacto/Social/Más Información).

issues: Gallery images appear broken/not loading (external URLs from senioradvisor.cl/fotos/ - data issue, not code issue)
Google Maps shows 'Oops! Something went wrong' error due to API key billing restrictions (expected, documented in iteration_41)

public_view_tests: Provider name visible: Fundación De Beneficencia Hogar De Cristo
NO admin bar visible in public view
NO edit/manage/add buttons visible in public view (0 found)
Contact section shows login prompt for non-logged users
Review section shows login prompt for non-logged users
admin_view_tests: Admin bar visible with 'Modo Admin' text
'Destacado / Suscripción / Place ID' button visible in admin bar
'Editar' button visible next to provider name
'Gestionar Slider' button visible on premium gallery
Video placeholder with 'Agregar Video' button visible
Provider has amenities - 'Editar' button visible on amenities section
Gallery section with 'Gestionar Fotos' button visible
Edit button on Social links section
Edit button on Más Información section
Google Reviews section visible with 4.9 rating

critical_code_review_comments: canEdit = isAdmin || isOwner correctly controls admin bar and edit buttons visibility
Hero section always uses bg-[#00e7ff] (cyan) for ALL users - correct implementation
EditBtn component correctly renders only when canEdit is true
Premium gallery shows for ALL users when allPhotos.length > 0
Thumbnail row code (lines 352-366) is correct but no providers have >4 photos to test
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 42: Provider Profile Page public/admin view testing COMPLETE. All features working correctly. Public view shows cyan hero, no admin bar, no edit buttons. Admin view shows admin bar with 'Modo Admin', all edit buttons visible. Test provider: cc9f5f3a-a2ea-4108-b358-d12e9448e746 (Fundación De Beneficencia Hogar De Cristo). Note: Gallery images appear broken (external URL issue), Google Maps shows billing error (expected). Thumbnail row feature (>4 photos) could not be tested as no providers have >4 photos.
